items.prompt: Icarus Verilog is often the better fit when…
choices: You need event scheduling, delays, and classic SV TB teaching
You need only C++ cosim at farm scale with no TB

items.prompt: Verilator is often the better fit when…
choices: Long regressions, speed, and C++ host cosim matter
The lesson requires hash delays in every block
You refuse to use a Makefile
You only need a one-line hello world in bash
Matched scenarios so you pick the tool for the job
Only random tool names with no context

items.prompt: Choosing Verilator for a delay-teaching lab can waste time because Verilator is not an event-delay teaching simulator.
